title: codereview pass 1: test still asserts -ENOMEM after change to -ENOSPC
description: After updating find_free_peer_locked to return -ENOSPC, the test in lichen/tests/app_identity/src/main.c:154 still expects -ENOMEM. This will cause test failure. Also, the security comment at app_identity.c:220 still references -ENOMEM. Update test, comment, and header docs for upsert_peer to specify return value for full table (-ENOSPC means peer table capacity reached). This is P1 correctness. Tag: codereview. Parent: project-LICHEN-pc5y
close_reason: Fixed all codereview findings including test update, header docs, comment sync, coap_keys consistency to -ENOSPC for table-full errors, handler update. 3 review passes completed with all P0-P4 addressed.
